title: hydrangea yesoensis var. rosalba
intro: Hydrangea yesoensis var. rosalba, also known as the mountain hydrangea or rosy mountain hydrangea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hydrangea yesoensis var. rosalba include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with arthritis, as well as its antioxidant properties which may help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Hydrangea yesoensis var. rosalba are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
